hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers to organize UBO screening, sanctions checks and onboarding evidence into an auditable workflow for VASP compliance operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Ubo reviews slow with fragmented workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to efficiently coordinate UBO verification across disconnected KYC and KYB providers. This fragmentation creates manual bottlenecks and weakens traceability for onboarding decisions and audit evidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links KYC and KYB provider outputs with risk rules, review actions and decision logs to create a structured, auditable UBO review workflow for compliance teams onboarding digital asset clients.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to UBO review
workflow_description: SFTY gathers onboarding and KYB provider outputs to route, review, escalate and document UBO findings within a structured compliance case workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One onboarding evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured UBO review workflows, preserving risk evidence and audit trails for clearer compliance control and faster decision-making.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured UBO review workflows that preserve audit evidence, enable bank due diligence and maintain enterprise-grade deployment control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how UBO checks integrate into onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves UBO review decisions

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects fragmented compliance outputs into structured workflows, enabling compliance teams to manage onboarding, UBO review, risk rules, cases, evidence and reporting with stronger control and traceability.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage UBO review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures UBO review by connecting KYB provider data, applying internal policies, routing reviews, opening cases and preserving decision logs for consistent, auditable compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider outputs and supporting evidence in one place, supporting audit-ready records for onboarding and UBO review decisions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates multiple KYC and KYB providers, combining their outputs into risk-based routing, connected reviews, case management and evidence collection without disrupting existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into one compliance workflow without replacing them.
final_title: Structure UBO review within controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects UBO checks, sanctions screening and onboarding evidence into audit-ready compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
